TK_A_TABLE_WITH_DATA_WAS_NOT_FOUND: A table with data was not found.
TK_AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_WHILE_IMPORTING_THE: An error occurred while importing the file.
TK_DATE_DATE_ALREADY_HAS_SOME_ACTIVITIES: Date {{date}} already has some activities. It must be empty before importing.
TK_DATE_FROM_MUST_NOT_BE_LATER_THAN_DATE: Date from must not be later than date to.
TK_DATE_MUST_BE_IN_FORMAT_YYYY_MM_DD: Date must be in format YYYY-MM-DD.
TK_DATE_RANGE_MUST_NOT_BE_BIGGER_THAN: Date range must not be bigger than {{maxDaysRange}} days ({{daysDiff}} now)
TK_DATE_TO_MUST_NOT_BE_EARLIER_THAN_DATE: Date to must not be earlier than date from
TK_FILE_NAME_MUST_CONTAIN_A_DATE_IN_FORM: File name must contain a date in format yyyy-mm-dd
TK_THERE_ARE_NO_ACTIVITIES_IN_SELECTED_P: There are no activities in selected period.
TK_TIME_MUST_BE_IN_FORMAT_HH_MM: Time must be in format HH:MM.
